effects.effect: Deal 50 Damage to a Vivosaur on the Field.

effects.name: Bone Return
effects.effect: If this card is Discarded: Place this card into your FP Zone, then target 1 Vivosaur your Opponent controls; deal 50 damage to it.

effects.name: Boney Roar
effects.effect: Deal 50 damage to all of your Opponent's Vivosaurs.

effects.name: Skeletal Assault
effects.effect: Discard 3 cards from the top of your Deck.
